name: cortex-plugin-slack-discord
description: Cortex agent as a bot in Slack and Discord channels — respond to @mentions, send notifications, push daily standup summaries, and trigger workflows from chat
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: slack_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or user. Supports Markdown formatting and Block Kit.

params.name: channel
params.description: Slack channel ID or name (e.g., '#general' or 'C01234567')

params.name: text
params.description: Message text (supports Slack mrkdwn formatting)

params.name: thread_ts
params.description: Thread timestamp to reply in a thread (optional)

params.name: blocks
params.description: JSON string of Slack Block Kit blocks for rich messages (optional)

tools.name: slack_read_channel
tools.description: Read recent messages from a Slack channel. Useful for catching up on conversations or finding context.

params.name: channel
params.description: Slack channel ID or name

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of messages to retrieve (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: oldest
params.description: Oldest message timestamp to include (UNIX seconds)

tools.name: slack_list_channels
tools.description: List all channels the Slack bot has access to, with IDs and member counts.

params.name: types
params.description: Comma-separated channel types to list

tools.name: slack_add_reaction
tools.description: Add an emoji reaction to a Slack message.

params.name: channel
params.description: Slack channel ID containing the message

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Message timestamp to react to

params.name: emoji
params.description: Emoji name without colons (e.g., 'thumbsup', 'rocket')

tools.name: discord_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Discord channel. Supports embeds and Markdown.

params.name: channel_id
params.description: Discord channel ID (snowflake)

params.name: content
params.description: Message text (supports Discord Markdown)

params.name: embeds
params.description: JSON string of Discord embed objects for rich messages

params.name: reply_to
params.description: Message ID to reply to (optional)

tools.name: discord_read_channel
tools.description: Read recent messages from a Discord channel.

params.name: channel_id
params.description: Discord channel ID (snowflake)

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of messages to retrieve (default: 50, max: 100)

params.name: before
params.description: Get messages before this message ID (for pagination)

tools.name: send_daily_standup
tools.description: Generate and send a daily standup summary to configured Slack and/or Discord channels. Pulls from Cortex session history to summarize what was worked on.

params.name: platform
params.description: Platform(s) to send to

params.name: slack_channel
params.description: Slack channel for the standup (overrides default)

params.name: discord_channel_id
params.description: Discord channel for the standup (overrides default)

params.name: custom_message
params.description: Optional custom message to include in the standup

tools.name: webhook_listen_status
tools.description: Check the status of the Slack/Discord event listeners and webhook configurations.

fields.label: Slack App Token
fields.description: Slack App-Level Token for Socket Mode (xapp-...)

fields.label: Default Slack Channel
fields.description: Default Slack channel for standups and notifications (e.g., '#general')

fields.label: Discord Bot Token
fields.description: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal

fields.label: Default Discord Channel ID
fields.description: Default Discord channel snowflake ID for standups and notifications

fields.label: Standup Time (UTC)
fields.description: Time in UTC to send daily standup (HH:MM format)

tools: Claude Code (Anthropic) — initial scaffold and implementation
